title: derris sylvestris
intro: Derris sylvestris, also known as the Derris or Tobena root, is a plant species native to tropical Asia and Africa, belonging to the Leguminosae family. The plant contains a toxic compound called rotenone, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Derris sylvestris have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds, reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting overall health. Herbal preparations of Derris sylvestris include root extracts, teas, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although its use should be cautioned due to potential toxicity.
